description:
Write a Gretl hansl script to manually compute OLS regression results using matrix algebra for the 'food.gdt' dataset, using 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the independent variable. The script must calculate the coefficients, residuals, sigma^2, variance-covariance matrix, standard errors, t-statistics, and R-squared using matrix operations instead of the built-in 'ols' or 'estimate' commands. Save the script to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/matrix_ols_script.inp' and export the results to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/matrix_ols_results.txt'.

The output file must follow this format:
intercept: [value]
slope: [value]
se_intercept: [value]
se_slope: [value]
t_intercept: [value]
t_slope: [value]
r_squared: [value]
sigma_squared: [value]
nobs: 40
